description: Desktop profiling matrix for the in-process node-llama-cpp path on Linux/macOS/Windows. Stock-build-only KV cache types (f16, q8_0, bf16) — fork-only types (tbq3_0/tbq4_0/qjl1_256) are rejected by the API validator on this path because the underlying libllama.so cannot honour them. Use scripts/benchmark/configs/aosp-default.json for the AOSP fork matrix.

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Write a 200-word story about a small robot who wants to learn to paint.
